title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 344.080 - Compensation of board members, exception
text:
344.080.  Compensation of board members, exception. — The members of the board, other than the director of the department of health and senior services or his designee, shall receive as compensation for their services fifty dollars for each day devoted to the affairs of the board, and shall be entitled to reimbursement for their expenses necessarily incurred in the discharge of their official duties.
(L. 1969 3d Ex. Sess. H.B. 33 § 8, A.L. 1979 S.B. 145, A.L. 1987 S.B. 277, A.L. 2007 H.B. 780)
